creator: jason.harmening@gmail.com
text:
On Thu, 13 Aug 2009 00:30:30 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of multimedia/libtuner,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/137706 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137706
> 
I do not approve of the update.  The libtuner-1.0.4 and cx88-1.2.1
builds on the FTP server are for development purposes only.  In
particular, the xc5000 and s5h1411 drivers in libtuner have not yet
been tested.  Once testing of all new features is complete,
libtuner-1.0.4 and cx88-1.2.1 will be pushed to ports.
